title: David Zaslav to Receive Estimated $887 Million in Compensation Related to Warner Bros.-Paramount Merger
summary: That’s quite a golden parachute: David Zaslav is set to receive an estimated $887 million in compensation with the closing of Paramount Skydance’s deal to buy Warner Bros. Discovery. On Monday, WBD disclosed the estimated amounts of compensation for each of WBD’s named executive officers related to…
